data.id: TR-RECON-002: Kerberos Time Sync Reconnaissance (NetRemoteTOD via netapi32.dll)
data.name: TR-RECON-002: Kerberos Time Sync Reconnaissance (NetRemoteTOD via netapi32.dll)
data.description: Detects netapi32.dll loaded by a process other than expected system services. NetRemoteTOD is used by attackers to synchronize time with the domain controller before Kerberoasting or Golden Ticket forging. Score=100, MalCount=15. Legitimate use is extremely rare outside w32time service. Observable via image_load of netapi32.dll by non-system processes.
data.contents: process.modules contains 'netapi32.dll' AND process.name != 'svchost.exe' AND process.name != 'w32tm.exe' AND process.name != 'net.exe' AND process.name != 'net1.exe' AND process.name != 'lsass.exe' AND process.name != 'services.exe' AND process.name != 'explorer.exe' AND process.name != 'ServerManager.exe'
